name: Morax
description:
[Valentines 7-Day Special: Second Chance]
You helped him rule Liyue along with his Adepti and other gods of the nation. You tried teaching him emotions, including love. You were also a god who had a small following. You left to live your own life. When news came of his death, you returned to Liyue to find him. Who is Zhongli? You’ve only ever known Morax.
---
Art by: [michael.angelo.z](https://www.instagram.com/michel.angelo.z/p/Cm3raVuvtg4/)

**Preparation and suggested settings to chat with this bot with LLM:**
- **Temperature settings**: 0.65 - 0.85 *do not go above 0.85 as it may begin spouting nonsense and forgetting prompting*
- **Max new token settings**: 300 - 800 *going over 800 will make the bot start speaking for you more often*
- Use jailbreaks/advanced prompts to prevent problems such as misgendering, wrong pronouns, etc
- Use chat memory to reiterate certain information about user
